title: Blue
excerpt: CVE-2017-0143, The associated ransomware attack, dubbed "WannaCry", is initiated through an SMBv2 remote code execution in Microsoft Windows. This exploit (codenamed "EternalBlue") has been made available on the internet through the Shadowbrokers dump on April 14th, 2017

title: Welcome to XIHacks — My Cyber Lab Notes
excerpt: Why I'm documenting everything I learn in cybersecurity, red teaming, and CTF writeups right here.

title: Active Directory Attack Fundamentals
excerpt: A deep dive into AD enumeration, Kerberoasting, Pass-the-Hash and lateral movement techniques.
